AI for nonprofits

Bring powerful generative AI into your workflow with Microsoft 365 Copilot, your AI assistant for work. Now available at a 15% discount for eligible nonprofits.
Get started Contact Sales

Microsoft 365 Business Premium

Microsoft 365 Business Premium is available to eligible nonprofits at a 75% discount on commercial pricing. $5.50 (USD) per user/month, paid yearly.
Get started
End of featured stories and announcements slideshow: navigate using the slide tabs section

3 steps to AI transformation

Bring powerful generative AI into your workflow—on the web, in your apps, or with agents. Start with Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat for secure AI chat, included in your Microsoft 365 subscription at no extra charge. Drive greater impact with Microsoft 365 Copilot, seamlessly integrated across your Microsoft 365 apps. Then unlock limitless customization with Copilot Studio to build intelligent agents tailored to your needs.
Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat Microsoft 365 Copilot Copilot Studio

Secure AI chat

Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat provides secure AI chat and is included in your Microsoft 365 subscription at no extra charge. It offers features like file upload, image generation, and Copilot Pages for saving and sharing content. Get started today to easily visualize data, brainstorm new ideas, draft content, and quickly find what you need.
Prompt gallery Free Copilot training

Your AI assistant at work

Microsoft 365 Copilot is your AI assistant at work. It integrates seamlessly with your existing Microsoft 365 applications, such as Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Microsoft Teams. It uses AI to assist with drafting documents and messages, generating insights from data, and summarizing meetings and emails. You can also easily simplify and automate processes with custom or pre-built agents. Now available at a 15% discount for eligible nonprofits.
Overview video Nonprofit events

Build custom AI assistants to fit your needs​

Create AI assistants that integrate directly into your systems of record using thousands of prebuilt data connectors. Use custom AI assistants to:​​

  • Respond to your constituents in real-time with an AI assistant on your website.
  • ​Help volunteers find the resources they need quickly.​​
  • Visualize organizational data for more impactful decision making.​
Readiness assessment Guided demo
Back to tabs

Microsoft 365 Copilot is transforming nonprofit work

Read Forrester TEI study

Increase fundraising output by up to 20% in three years.

Improved communications and campaign development make it easier for marketing and development staff to improve their reach and fundraising results.

Improve operational efficiency by up to 25%.

Staff spend less time in meetings, searching for information, and creating content by leveraging prompt engineering. 

Decrease technology costs by at least 50%.

Streamlining AI use through Copilot reduces the need for third-party services and other AI tools.

Increase staff retention by up to 18%.

When staff can spend less time on mundane, repetitive tasks, they are also able to complete more of their work faster.

Customer stories

Skip pretext Sneak Peek slideshow: navigate using the slide tabs Skip post text

Salvation Army UK and Ireland

The Salvation Army UK and Ireland modernizes employee workflows to better serve communities with Copilot.

Learn more about Salvation Army UK and Ireland

Parlan

Parlan saves time for children’s mental health care and provider wellbeing with Copilot.

Learn about Parlan

Latino Economic Development Center

Latino Economic Development Center helps communities thrive through Microsoft technology.

Learn more about Latino Economic Development Center

British Heart Foundation

The British Heart Foundation (BHF) is Europe’s largest independent, non-commercial funder of research into heart and cardiovascular disease. BHF is using Microsoft 365 Copilot to improve efficiency and productivity for its operations.

Learn more about British Heart Foundation

Arapahoe Libraries

Arapahoe Library sought to serve everyone in the Arapahoe county, despite finite resources. To more efficiently and creatively serve its patrons, the library system adopted Microsoft 365 Copilot, helping them save time on administrative tasks, facilitate collaboration, and protect patrons’ privacy.

Learn more about Arapahoe Libraries
End pretext Sneak Peek slideshow: navigate using the slide tabs End post text

Microsoft 365 Copilot pricing

Microsoft 365 Copilot now available to eligible nonprofits for $25.50 (USD) per user, per month, paid yearly. A separate license for a qualifying Microsoft 365 plan is required to purchase Microsoft 365 Copilot. Start by signing into the Microsoft admin center or get in contact with us.
Microsoft Admin Center Contact a sales specialist
